overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a western-themed open world game, showing a character in cowboy attire walking along wooden waterfront docks and industrial rail yards. A steam train passes by emitting thick smoke as the character explores the harbor area with wooden pavilions, lumber piles, and brick factory buildings.

events.description: character enters the shadow of the covered wooden pavilion, reducing direct sunlight
character exits the pavilion back into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward and through a covered wooden pavilion structure on the waterfront

entered.detail: large covered structure with shingled roof and wooden support beams extending over the water
calm harbor water visible beyond the pavilion structure
weathered wooden planks forming the walkway underfoot
stacks of wooden planks and construction materials

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden dock toward a covered pavilion structure. The scene transitions from bright sunlight into the shadowed interior of the pavilion and back into sunlight, with harbor water visible through the wooden supports.

events.description: ground surface changes from wooden deck to dirt and sand mix
steam train becomes visible in the distance emitting black smoke

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt path past lumber piles and wooden crates, approaching the train tracks

entered.detail: yellow wooden sign with black text reading 'CAUTION: UNSTABLE' mounted on a post
stacked wooden cargo boxes and barrels along the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the wooden pavilion onto a dirt path lined with lumber piles and wooden crates. A yellow caution sign is passed on the left as the character approaches the waterfront, with a steam train becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial rail dock with passing train

events.description: steam locomotive begins passing by on the left, emitting thick black smoke
character adjusts walking path to move parallel with the moving train

agents.ego_description: walking on wooden platform as a large steam train passes by closely on the left side

notable_agents.action: steam locomotive moving along tracks parallel to the character, emitting thick black smoke from its stack

entered.detail: black steam locomotive with 'Pacific Union' text and multiple freight cars
tall wooden water tower with metal tank on support legs
large multi-story brick industrial building with arched windows and smokestacks
thick black and white smoke billowing from factory smokestacks and train

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden dock platform as a massive steam train passes by on the left, filling the scene with smoke. Industrial buildings including a water tower and brick factory become prominent in the background.

events.description: character passes the water tower and enters the main industrial complex area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the wooden walkway parallel to the moving train cars, passing industrial structures

notable_agents.action: freight train cars continuing to move along the tracks, gradually pulling ahead of the character

entered.detail: wooden telegraph poles with multiple cross-arms and wires running parallel to the tracks

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking alongside the moving train, passing close to a large water tower and brick factory building. The train gradually moves ahead as the character progresses through the industrial dock area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rail yard with multiple tracks

events.description: train has completely passed and is now moving away into the distance
entering more open rail yard area with multiple parallel tracks visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the tracks as the train recedes into the distance, exploring the industrial rail yard

entered.detail: multiple parallel railway tracks with wooden ties and gravel ballast
additional wooden and brick warehouse buildings in the background

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the industrial area as the train moves away into the distance. The scene opens into a wider rail yard with multiple tracks, utility poles, and various industrial warehouse buildings surrounding the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunny waterfront dock into a smoke-filled industrial rail yard. It begins with the character walking along a wooden pier, passing through the shifting light and shadows of a covered pavilion with harbor water visible through the supports. As the character moves onto a dirt path lined with lumber piles and crates, the scene opens toward the waterfront where a steam train appears in the distance. The camera then tracks alongside the massive locomotive as it passes by, filling the air with thick smoke and revealing a backdrop of brick factories and a towering water tower. Finally, the train pulls away into the distance as the environment expands into a wide rail yard characterized by multiple tracks, utility poles, and sprawling industrial warehouses.
